name: Eye of Vecna
description:
{@book Vecna|XDMG|8|Vecna} was a mighty wizard who, through magic and conquest, forged a terrible empire. For all his power, however, Vecna feared death and took steps to prevent his demise by becoming a lich.
A treacherous lieutenant named Kas brought Vecna's rule to an end in a terrible battle. Of Vecna, all that remained were one hand and one eye, grisly Artifacts that still seek to work Vecna's will in the world.
The Eye of Vecna and the {@item Hand of Vecna|XDMG} are separate Artifacts that
